summary: The implementation successfully integrates external REST API for chart analysis, replacing all local mock analysis logic. All requirements are implemented with proper TypeScript types, error handling, retry logic, multi-provider configuration, and backend persistence layer adapted for external analysis data. Portuguese text is preserved throughout.

hallucinated_features.description: Added mapping utility (mapApiResponse.ts) to convert API response format to internal AnalysisResult format with mock resistance levels generation
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify creating a mapping utility or generating mock resistance levels when the external API doesn't provide them. The requirement only asks to map API fields to UI components.

REQ-25 requires adapting storage functions to accept externally-generated data, but does not specify renaming the method. The renamed method could break existing frontend code that called 'addAnalysis'.
